channel.title: Nutrient Flow
channel.description: Fresh takes for indoor hydroponic growers.

item.title: Ask the forge: your leafy greens questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the leafy greens questions indoor hydroponic growers keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in lighting with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest lighting adjustments that indoor hydroponic growers report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: hydroponic nutrients explained
item.description: The persistent myths around hydroponic nutrients explained, stress-tested against what indoor hydroponic growers actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your systems in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying systems project for indoor hydroponic growers — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/IndoorGarden is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the leafy greens community this week.

item.title: The lighting checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified lighting purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of nutrients
item.description: The most common early stumbles in nutrients, and the cheap corrections that fix them for indoor hydroponic growers.

item.title: "grow lights for greens" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about grow lights for greens through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.
